events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: a breaker not listed/classified for this specific panelboard is a code violation (voids the panel's UL listing under NEC 240/110.3(B) intent) and an active safety hazard since the panel is energized — mismatched breakers risk poor bus-stab contact, overheating, and arcing, and may also fail to deliver required AFCI/GFCI protection (210.8/210.12). Decision: **fail**, risk **high**, with corrective actions to de-energize, swap in a properly listed breaker, verify AFCI/GFCI needs, and re-check terminations per 110.14(C) before closing up.
